scores.correctness_notes: Accurately covers layer YAML structure, required fields, all three protocol types with correct location formats, labels with env var substitution, and pebble_service auto-label. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'services: [all, -noisy-service]' exclusion syntax and '-all' removal syntax are not in the gold standard and may be hallucinated or at least unverified. The ops.pebble.Layer Python example and loki-push-api library mention are plausible but not in the gold standard.
